factors.rationale: The product is the dominant focal point and easily identifiable.
The accessory is shown with a phone, indicating a clear use case.
The image suggests specific benefits like MagSafe compatibility.
The arrangement of elements is clear and easy to follow.
Material quality and construction details are visible.
The brand logo is visible, providing a strong trust signal.
The image has strong contrast and is easily readable.
The image has a clear campaign intent with a branded presentation.
